---
title: "Infiltration Test"
---

Infiltration testing helps users assess how quickly water enters the soil. It is a practical field method for understanding water movement and related structural behaviour.

![](../images/tools/infiltration-field.png){.tool-photo width="45%"}

| Item | Description |
|---|---|
| **What it is** | A field method for measuring water entry into soil. |
| **Main purpose** | To assess infiltration and support interpretation of hydraulic behaviour. |
| **Where used** | Field |
| **Typical users** | Farmers, advisors, researchers, field technicians |
| **Typical outputs** | Infiltration rate and support for broader hydraulic interpretation |

## Main target variables

- infiltration rate,
- water entry behaviour,
- support for porosity and hydraulic interpretation.

## Descriptor groups supported

- reduced water retention / water behaviour,
- structure,
- compaction support,
- and practical field comparison.
